mainText: Today's top stories: OpenAI launches Claude Mythos rival GPT-5.6 Sol, Why do South Koreans love AI so much?, A startup claims it broke through a bottleneck, Anthropic’s latest feud with the government continues, The emergence of the web data infrastructure layer, XAI fired engineer who raised alarms about Grok, Amazon borrows $17.5B from banks as AI spending, Google just redesigned the search box, China Opens World’s First Wind-Powered Underwater Data Center, There’s Finally Video of a Great White Shark
